classes.name: Biology 101
classes.subject: Science
classes.description: Introduction to cellular biology and genetics

decks.title: Chapter 1: Cell Structure
decks.description: Learn about cell organelles and functions

cards.front: What is the function of the mitochondria?
cards.back: The mitochondria is the powerhouse of the cell, responsible for producing ATP through cellular respiration.

cards.front: What is the cell membrane composed of?
cards.back: The cell membrane is composed of a phospholipid bilayer with embedded proteins.

cards.front: What is the function of ribosomes?
cards.back: Ribosomes are responsible for protein synthesis by translating mRNA into amino acid chains.
cards.note: Can be free-floating or attached to the ER
